docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY VARIVODA, LUYBOV AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, CHRISTY 101 ROOFING CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
